description_long: This elderly person is depicted as a tall, thin figure with a pale, wrinkled face and a bald head. The individual wears a long, dark maroon robe that extends to the ankles, with sleeves ending just above the wrists, revealing pale hands. The robe is simple and unadorned, with a high, dark collar that contrasts with the lighter skin tone. The face is gaunt, with pronounced cheekbones, deep-set eyes, and visible wrinkles, giving an impression of age and frailty. The posture is upright, with arms slightly extended outward and fingers relaxed. The overall appearance is somber and reserved, with no visible accessories or walking aids.
description: A tall, thin elderly person with a bald, wrinkled face, wearing a long maroon robe and standing upright with arms slightly outstretched.
description_view_0: Front view shows the gaunt, pale face, high collar, and the full length of the maroon robe with arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the bald head, the straight posture, and the robe's drape along the body.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, the robe's full length and width, and the arms extending slightly backward.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the face, the robe's contour, and the relaxed hand position.
attribute_clothing_style: Long, loose-fitting maroon robe with a high dark collar, simple and formal with no visible patterns or accessories.
attribute_posture: Standing upright with arms slightly outstretched.
attribute_facial_features: Pale, wrinkled face with pronounced cheekbones, deep-set eyes, and a somber expression.
